bead.title: fix(web): doc graph edges and arrowheads use foreground token, not border-line
bead.description: D3Graph.svelte:107,165 uses border-line/dark-border-line tokens that resolve to ~1.05:1 / ~1.4:1 contrast against canvas backgrounds (well below WCAG AA 3:1 for non-text). Swap to foreground tokens. D3Graph has exactly one consumer (graph/+page.svelte), so the change is fully scoped.
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/D3Graph.svelte uses fg-default/fg-muted (or new graph-edge token) for stroke + arrowhead fill. 2. Computed-style assertions show >=3:1 contrast in both light and dark mode. 3. cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun test passes. 4. Existing edge geometry untouched.
